subject: Add per-user activity feed to Profile page
description: GoFundMe profiles show a chronological activity feed ("donated $200 to...", "started a fundraiser", "posted an update"). We have updates[] on campaigns and donations data that can be filtered by organizer/donor. Add a compact "Recent activity" section below campaign history showing the organizer's updates and donations in chronological order. Reuse the activity card pattern from CommunityPage.

changes: Added recent activity feed to ProfilePage between network impact and discover organizers
Aggregates campaign updates + launch events, sorted by date, top 5
Flame icon for launches, CalendarDays for updates, links to campaign
